title: Business Development Executive / Senior Business Development Executive
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

OA Group of Companies (OA GOC) is a regional professional services group headquartered in Singapore, with an expanding presence across Malaysia and the region. We partner with business owners, CFOs, and leadership teams to build strong corporate foundations, enhance governance and compliance, and enable sustainable, long-term growth. Our integrated platform spans Audit & Assurance, Accounting & Outsourcing, Corporate Secretarial & Compliance, Tax Compliance & Advisory, Business Advisory, and Digital Transformation. By combining technical depth with commercial insight, we help clients move from operational stability to strategic scale. At OA GOC, we value professionalism, ownership, and long-term partnership — with our clients and with our people.

Job Summary

As OA GOC advances its growth strategy, the Business Development Executive and Senior Business Development Executive roles are critical to expanding our client base and deepening client relationships. You will originate and convert business opportunities, collaborate with internal teams to deliver integrated solutions, and contribute measurably to group-wide revenue growth within a professional services environment.

Responsibilities

  • Identify, qualify, and convert business opportunities within SME and mid-market segments to drive revenue growth
  • Build and sustain trusted relationships with founders, CFOs, finance leaders, and senior executives to support long-term client retention
  • Execute targeted outreach campaigns, network strategically, and leverage events, referrals, and partnerships to generate new leads
  • Prepare and deliver tailored proposals and presentations that align with client needs and business objectives
  • Manage and forecast your sales pipeline with discipline, ensuring accuracy and accountability for achieving targets
  • Collaborate cross-functionally with service teams to design and implement integrated client solutions that enhance client outcomes
  • Demonstrate commercial judgment and resilience to progress from opportunity execution to ownership of key accounts or growth initiatives
  • Contribute visibly to group-level revenue growth through consistent pipeline development and client conversion

Who We Are Looking For

  • Demonstrate strong ownership mindset and resilience to meet performance-driven targets
  • Communicate professionally and build relationships confidently with senior stakeholders
  • Manage sales pipeline and execution with discipline and accuracy
  • Exhibit commercial acumen and outcome-focused decision-making in client engagement
  • Adapt and grow within a professional services environment, maintaining credibility and quality of engagement

Backgrounds That Succeed in This Role

  • Experience in business development, B2B sales, consulting sales, or professional services business development
  • Understanding of finance, compliance, governance, or business operations is advantageous
  • Professionals transitioning from accounting, audit, tax, or corporate secretarial roles seeking a commercial client-facing position
  • Curiosity about business challenges and ability to ask structured, commercial questions

Career Development

  • Progression opportunities include senior business development leadership, key account ownership, sector-focused growth roles, or group-level commercial functions
  • Advancement is merit-based, aligned with demonstrated performance, capability, and leadership potential

What We Offer

  • Clear and structured career progression pathways
  • Mentorship and ongoing professional development opportunities
  • Competitive base salary with uncapped incentive compensation
  • A professional, performance-driven team environment
  • A meaningful role in shaping OA GOC’s continued growth

Why Join OA GOC

  • Build a long-term career in business development within a respected professional services group
  • Join a culture that values professionalism, accountability, and measurable impact
  • Thrive in a role that offers autonomy, ownership of outcomes, and opportunities for growth alongside the firm

postedCompany.description:
OA Group of Companies: Your Gateway to a Dynamic and Fulfilling Career

At OA Group of Companies (“OA GoC”), we don’t just provide services; we craft success stories. With our two esteemed brands, Singapore Corporate Services (“SCS”) and OA Assurance (“OAA”), we are redefining excellence in assurance, compliance, and advisory services. SCS, our compliance and advisory arm, and OA Assurance, our assurance wing, work in tandem to offer comprehensive solutions to our clients.

The Core of OA GoC: Our People

At the core of OA GoC are our three dedicated partners and a vibrant team of over fifty professionals. Together, we form a formidable force in the corporate world, committed to offering tailored solutions that resonate with the unique needs of our clients. Our portfolio boasts over five hundred satisfied clients, a testament to our growing expertise and our evolution into more than just a service provider. We are partners in the truest sense, dedicated to propelling businesses forward in a dynamic corporate landscape.

Why Join OA GoC?

OA GoC isn’t just a workplace; it’s a launchpad for your professional aspirations. Here’s why you should consider joining us:

  1. Vibrant work culture: Step into an environment brimming with youth and energy. Our team’s spirit is infectious, and our workplace buzzes with ideas and innovation.
  2. Flexibility for work-life harmony: We understand the importance of balance. Our flexible working arrangements ensure you can excel at work while enjoying a fulfilling personal life.
  3. Unmatched professional growth: Propel your career with our plethora of professional development opportunities. At OA GoC, learning never stops.
  4. Supportive learning environment: Our culture of openness and collaboration makes it easy for everyone to seek guidance and support not just from the department in-charge but from any member of the team.

Be More Than Just an Employee

Join OA GoC and be part of a journey that transcends the conventional employer-employee relationship. Here, you’re not just a part of the team; you’re a vital contributor to a shared vision. We offer more than jobs – we offer careers that make a difference, bring peace of mind, and drive businesses and individuals toward their zenith.

Embark on Your Journey with OA GoC

Are you ready to be part of a team that’s shaping the future of the corporate world? At OA GoC, your career is a journey of growth, learning, and triumphs. Come, be a part of our story, and let’s forge new paths together.
postedCompany.name: OA ASSURANCE PAC
